subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename server service directory and classes from Pulse to Tasks
description:
Rename the server-side Pulse service directory, files, and class/function identifiers.

## Directory Rename

Rename `apps/server/src/services/pulse/` to `apps/server/src/services/tasks/`.

## File Renames Within the Directory

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `pulse-store.ts` | `task-store.ts` |
| `scheduler-service.ts` | `task-scheduler-service.ts` |
| `pulse-presets.ts` | `task-presets.ts` (temporary — replaced by templates in Phase 3) |
| `pulse-state.ts` | `task-state.ts` |
| `index.ts` | `index.ts` (update exports) |
| `__tests__/pulse-store.test.ts` | `__tests__/task-store.test.ts` |
| `__tests__/scheduler-service.test.ts` | `__tests__/task-scheduler-service.test.ts` |
| `__tests__/pulse-presets.test.ts` | `__tests__/task-presets.test.ts` |

## Class/Function Renames

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `PulseStore` | `TaskStore` |
| `SchedulerService` | `TaskSchedulerService` |
| `buildPulseAppend()` | `buildTaskContext()` |
| Any `pulseStore` variable names | `taskStore` |
| Any `schedulerService` variable names | `taskSchedulerService` or `taskScheduler` |

Update all internal method names that reference "schedule" to reference "task" where it makes the code clearer. For example:
- `createSchedule()` -> `createTask()`
- `updateSchedule()` -> `updateTask()`
- `deleteSchedule()` -> `deleteTask()`
- `getSchedule()` -> `getTask()`
- `listSchedules()` -> `listTasks()`
- `registerSchedule()` -> `registerTask()`

## Update imports across the server

Search for all imports from `services/pulse/` or `../pulse/` within `apps/server/src/` and update to `services/tasks/` or `../tasks/`.

Key files that import from the pulse service:
- `apps/server/src/index.ts` (creates PulseStore and SchedulerService)
- `apps/server/src/routes/pulse.ts` (uses PulseStore and SchedulerService)
- `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/mcp-tools/pulse-tools.ts`
- Any other files referencing pulse services

## Update test files

Update all `describe()` blocks, variable names, and import paths in the renamed test files.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `apps/server/src/services/pulse/` directory no longer exists
- `apps/server/src/services/tasks/` exists with all renamed files
- All class names updated (`TaskStore`, `TaskSchedulerService`)
- All internal imports within `apps/server/` updated
- Test files renamed and updated
- `pnpm typecheck` passes for `@dorkos/server`
activeForm: Renaming server service directory and classes from Pulse to Tasks
